resources.string: Blocking active. Headphone media key is suppressed.
Blocking off. Other apps will receive media key presses.

When enabled, the app runs a foreground service that captures media button events from your wired or Bluetooth headphones and discards them, so other apps (like messengers that mute/unmute on the play/pause key) won\'t react.\n\nA persistent notification is required by Android while the service is running. Tap it to return to this screen, or use Stop to disable blocking.
Foreground service that intercepts headphone media key
